privileged_info_summary: The task deactivates a user account for 'Alex Morgan' (username: amorgan). Setup creates a synthetic user via INSERT statement with login='amorgan', name='Alex Morgan', active=1, email='amorgan@example.com', and password hashed from 'Contractor2024!'. Success requires: (1) user record exists, (2) active field is set to 0 (inactive), (3) name field contains '(CONTRACT ENDED)' suffix. All metadata claims are correct.
